steps.title: Identify the goal's requirement
steps.content: The student wants to “indicate the title of a novel that won a Nebula Award.” This means the choice must name the specific novel and connect it to the award.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content: C directly names Babel-17 and states it won a Nebula Award in 1967. A omits the title, B mentions neither the novel nor the award, and D doesn't reference the award at all. That matches choice C — C is correct.
